title: Bridge Essay: Serotonergic psychedelics and personality: A systematic review of contemporary research.
concept: Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.

**Serotonergic psychedelics and personality: A systematic review of contemporary research.** - Neurosci Biobehav Rev (2018). DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2018.02.004. PMID: 29452127. Serotonergic psychedelics act as agonists at cortical 5-HT2A receptors and seem to induce personality changes. We conducted a systematic review of studies assessing the effects of these drugs on personality. Papers published from 1985-2016 were included from PubMed, LILACS, and SciELO databases. Three hundred and sixty-nine studies were identified, and 18 were included.
